query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN faq IS NULL OR faq = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_faq,
  SUM(CASE WHEN faq IS NOT NULL AND faq != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_faq,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN faq IS NOT NULL AND faq != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 1) as faq_coverage_percent
FROM island_guides
